meaning: adj.治疗的,治疗学的n.治疗剂,治疗学家
examples: Our therapeutic style offers release from stored tensions, traumas, and grief.
All were grown in conjunction with mouse cells, making future therapeutic uses unlikely.
They present an ideal target for new therapies and may have even wider therapeutic implications.
"I think my facials feel just as social as they are therapeutic, " she said, recently.
Scientists will almost certainly use fewer eggs if therapeutic cloning is used on people.
